Container.Name: snorcal-slicer
Container.Overview:
Companion slicer sidecar for snorcal. Runs OrcaSlicer / BambuStudio / Snapmaker Orca under Xvfb on Ubuntu 22.04 and exposes them over HTTP on port 3001.
This container does NOT serve the web UI — install the `snorcal` template for that. Both containers must share the same /data volume path so the app can read gcode produced by the slicer.
amd64 only — the upstream slicer binaries are x86_64 AppImages. Will not run on arm64 hosts.
Container.Requires: Must share the same /data host path as the snorcal app container. Attach both to a shared custom Docker network so the app can resolve this container as `snorcal-slicer`.

Config.Name: Slicer Port
Config.Description: Host port for the slicer HTTP API. Set SLICER_URL on the snorcal app container to http://snorcal-slicer:3001.

Config.Name: Shared Data
Config.Description: MUST be the same host path as the snorcal app container's App Data path. Models + generated gcode flow through here.

Config.Name: SLICER_PORT
Config.Description: Port the sidecar listens on internally.

Config.Name: SLICER_HOST
Config.Description: Bind address inside the container. Leave as 0.0.0.0.

Config.Name: DISPLAY
Config.Description: X display started by the entrypoint via Xvfb. Change only if you know the entrypoint already starts Xvfb on a different display.
